metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code skills and plugins by Will Webster

plugins.description: Unified SOC analyst workflow — triage, investigate, hunt, tune, and manage cases

plugins.description: Agent-delegated SOC workflow — distributes work across specialized sub-agents

plugins.description: Develop and troubleshoot CQL security detection queries for LogScale

plugins.description: Tune NGSIEM detections for false positive reduction with 38 enrichment functions

plugins.description: Design multi-event behavioral detection rules using correlate()

plugins.description: Curated CQL detection engineering pattern catalog for NG-SIEM

plugins.description: Detection-to-response mapping and SOAR playbook design with tiered response actions

plugins.name: crowdstrike-source-threat-modeling
